nasb.text: Ehud made himself a sword which had two edges, a cubit in length, and he bound it on his right thigh under his cloak.

esv.text: And Ehud made for himself a sword with two edges, a cubit in length, and he bound it on his right thigh under his clothes.

cnv.text: 以笏做了一把兩刃的劍，長半公尺，縛在右腿上，在衣服底下。

ccb.text: 他造了一把约半米长的两刃利剑，绑在右腿的衣服里。
